headline: Built for everyone
subheadline: Thousands of teams, from startups to enterprises, use Elixpo to orchestrate their projects.

categories.title: For Developers
categories.description: Use a single unified system for all your codebases, deployments, and CI/CD pipelines.

categories.title: For Managers & Leaders
categories.description: Get always up-to-date data and monitor performance across all your projects.

categories.title: For Design Teams
categories.description: Elixpo helps design teams by streamlining assets, managing workflows, and tracking revisions.

highlights.title: Real-time Collaboration
highlights.description: Work together seamlessly with live updates and instant sync across all team members.

highlights.title: Advanced Analytics
highlights.description: Deep insights into project progress, team velocity, and resource allocation.

highlights.title: Smart Integrations
highlights.description: Connect with the tools you already use. 100+ integrations available out of the box.
